items.title: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
items.dek: Iran had earlier said there were no plans for a direct meeting with a US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.
items.body: Iran had earlier said there were no plans for a direct meeting with a US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Orbán steps down from Hungarian parliament after landslide defeat
items.dek: The outgoing prime minister will not take up his seat after leading his party back into opposition.
items.body: The outgoing prime minister will not take up his seat after leading his party back into opposition.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Mexico says US agents killed in crash weren't permitted to operate there
items.dek: The two Americans who reportedly worked for the CIA died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab.
items.body: The two Americans who reportedly worked for the CIA died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab.
items.author: IriLine Desk
